name: NASNetMobile
fullName: Learning Transferable Architectures for Scalable Image Recognition (Mobile)
description: Mobile-optimized neural architecture found through automated architecture search. Achieves good accuracy-to-efficiency ratio for mobile deployment.

educationalNote.summary: Input layer receiving normalized RGB matrices.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

Represents the parameter difference (4,330,332) between the visualizer's simplified layer routing graph and the official Keras Applications parameter count.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Ensures model-level parameter math matches the sum of the individual layers exactly.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Aligns the visual topology weights with Keras Applications measurements.
